signals.headline: Kansas Senate President Ty Masterson announces gubernatorial bid to challenge Democratic Gov
signals.raw:
Kansas Senate President Ty Masterson announces gubernatorial bid to challenge Democratic Gov. Laura Kelly in 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ty Masterson, Kansas state Senate president, has officially joined the Republican field for the 2026 gubernatorial race, aiming to flip the governorship from Democratic control after Gov. Laura Kelly's second term ends due to term limits.[1]
